rationale: X's core claim — both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts regardless of already_submitted — directly matches the ground-truth reviewer's rationale for why the gate removal is correct, and X reaches the same APPROVE verdict the actual reviewers gave (two LGTMs). Y reaches REQUEST CHANGES, contradicting the real outcome, hedges its main finding as unverified ('tool budget exhausted'), mischaracterizes pre-existing len>1 fallthrough as a new gap, and its diagnostics contain unrelated fabricated content (db/init.sql, iteration-limit blockers) that has nothing to do with this diff, undermining credibility. X's comments are better grounded with concrete file/line verification and a useful actionable regression-test suggestion.
